description_long: This object is a pair of true wireless earbuds housed in a compact, rounded charging case. The case is smooth and features a hinged lid that opens to reveal two contoured earbuds, each with a short stem and a visible black sensor or touch area. The earbuds are ergonomically shaped to fit comfortably in the ear, with silicone tips for a secure fit. The case appears to be made of glossy white plastic, with a subtle seam where the lid meets the base. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with no visible branding or external buttons. The object is small enough to be easily carried in a pocket or bag, making it suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A pair of white wireless earbuds with a sleek charging case, featuring a smooth, rounded design and ergonomic ear tips. The case opens to reveal the earbuds, which have short stems and black sensor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earbuds seated in the open charging case, with the lid fully open and the black sensor areas visible.
description_view_1: Angled top view highlighting the ergonomic shape of the earbuds and the interior of the case, with one earbud more prominently visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the closed case and the stems of the earbuds, with the lid partially obscuring the interior.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on one earbud and the open case, emphasizing the depth and curvature of the case and the earbud's stem.
